zh.Glendonwyn, Westerkirk, Dumfries, Scotla: 英國蘇格蘭度福利爾維斯特爾吉可
zh.lifeSummary: 當Adam FitzHugh於1280年出生在英國越可爾里士滿時，他的父親Hugh FitzHenry23歲，母親Albreda Steyngrave36歲。他和Agnes de Towers至少有1個兒子。他去世於1363年7月20日在蘇格蘭洛包爾享年83歲。

zh-hans.Glendonwyn, Westerkirk, Dumfries, Scotla: 英国苏格兰度福利爾維斯特爾吉可
zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Adam FitzHugh于1280年出生在英国越可爾里士滿时，他的父亲Hugh FitzHenry23岁，母亲Albreda Steyngrave36岁。他和Agnes de Towers至少有1个儿子。他去世于1363年7月20日在苏格兰洛包爾享年83岁。

nameMeanings.name: FitzHugh
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (Northamptonshire): from Anglo-Norman French fi(t)z ‘son’ (see Fitz ) + the personal name Hugh (see Hugh ), ‘son of Hugh’.

History: William Fitzhugh (1651–1701), from Bedford, England, emigrated to VA c. 1670 and established himself on the Potomac River in what was then Stafford County, VA, as a planter and exporter. He also practiced law, was a member of the Virginia House of Burgesses, and served in 1687 as lieutenant colonel of the county militia.

variants.name: Fitz
meanings: English: from Anglo-Norman French fi(t)z ‘son’ (from Latin filius), used originally to distinguish a son from a father bearing the same personal name and then conventionalized as a hereditary surname, or short for a surname of which fiz ‘son’ was the first element, for example Fitzhenry and Fitzroy .
German: from a vernacular pet form of the personal name Vinzenz (see Vincent ) or Vitus (see Vito , compare Veit ). Compare also Fietz .

nameMeanings.name: Adam
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.

historicEvents.title: Jews Expelled From England
historicEvents.description: After years of anti-Semitic behavior, King Edward I expelled Jews from England in 1290.

historicEvents.title: Famine Strikes Europe
historicEvents.description: A famine caused by cold winters and wet summers across Europe caused millions to die due to starvation. Desperation from hunger caused high levels of crime, stampedes in bread lines in London, infanticide, and even cannibalism throughout Europe.

historicEvents.title: First War of Scottish Independence
historicEvents.description: The First War of Scottish Independence began after England invaded Scotland in 1296. The Treaty of Edinburgh was signed in 1328 which declared peace between the two kingdoms and brought the war to an end.

historicEvents.title: The Hundred Years' War
historicEvents.description: The Hundred Years' War between France and England was largely due to the question of legitimate succession to the French crown.

en.lifeSummary: When Adam FitzHugh was born in 1280, in Richmond, Yorkshire, England, his father, Hugh FitzHenry, was 23 and his mother, Albreda Steyngrave, was 36. He had at least 1 son with Agnes de Towers. He died on 20 July 1363, in Roxburghshire, Scotland, at the age of 83.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Adam FitzHugh est né en 1280, à Richmond, Everwyck, Angleterre, son père, Hugh FitzHenry, avait 23 ans et sa mère, Albreda Steyngrave, avait 36 ans. Il a eu au moins 1 fils avec Agnes de Towers. Il est décédé le 20 juillet 1363, à Roxburghshire, Écosse, à l’âge de 83 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Adam FitzHugh 1280 in Richmond, Yorkshire, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Hugh FitzHenry 23 und seine Mutter Albreda Steyngrave 36. Er hatte mit Agnes de Towers mindestens 1 Sohn. Er starb am 20. Juli 1363 im Alter von 83 Jahren in Roxburghshire, Scotland.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Adam FitzHugh è nato il nel 1280 nel Richmond, Yorkshire, England, il suo padre, Hugh FitzHenry, aveva 23 anni e il suo madre, Albreda Steyngrave, aveva 36 anni. Lui avuto almeno 1 figlio con Agnes de Towers. Morì il 20 luglio 1363, nel Roxburghshire, Scotland, all'età di 83 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Adam FitzHughが1280年にイギリスヨークシュアイアリチモンドで生まれた時，父Hugh FitzHenryは23歳，母Albreda Steyngraveは36歳であった。彼はAgnes de Towersとの間に少なくとも1人の息子をもうけた。彼は1363年7月20日にスコットランドロクスブルグhシュアイアで83歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Adam FitzHugh(이)가 1280년 영국 요르크실르 리ch몽에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Hugh FitzHenry(은)는 23세였고, 그의 어머니 Albreda Steyngrave(은)는 36세였다. 그는 Agnes de Towers(와)과 적어도 한 명의 아들을 두었다. 그는 1363년 7월 20일 스컷랜드 록스버그h실르에서 83세의 나이로 사망했다.

mn.Glendonwyn, Westerkirk, Dumfries, Scotla: Westerkirk, Dumfreize, Шотланд, Нэгдсэн Вант Улс

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Adam FitzHugh nasceu em 1280, em Richmond, Yorkshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Hugh FitzHenry, tinha 23 anos e sua mãe, Albreda Steyngrave, tinha 36 anos. Ele teve pelo menos 1 filho com Agnes de Towers. Ele faleceu em 20 de julho de 1363, em Roxburghshire, Scotland, com 83 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Adam FitzHugh родился в 1280 г. в местности ричмонд, еркшир, Англия, его отцу по имени Hugh FitzHenry было 23 года, а матери, которую звали Albreda Steyngrave, 36. У него был по крайней мере 1 сын от Agnes de Towers. Он умер 20 июля 1363 г. в местности роксбургшир, Шотландия в возрасте 83 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Adam FitzHugh nació en 1280, en Richmond, Yorkshire, Inglaterra, su papá, Hugh FitzHenry, tenía 23 años y su mamá, Albreda Steyngrave, tenía 36 años. Tuvo por lo menos 1 hijo con Agnes de Towers. Murió el 20 de julio de 1363, en Roxburghshire, Scotland, a la edad de 83 años.
